query: SELECT id, title, category, CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(title_es,'')) as title_es_len, CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(description_es,'')) as desc_es_len FROM special_cases WHERE title_es IS NULL OR title_es = '' OR description_es IS NULL OR description_es = '' ORDER BY id LIMIT 30;
